homepage.heroSubline: Safe, efficient demolition and janitorial services across the South Bay. Licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.
aboutText: Three Star Demolition & Janitorial started with a simple mission: to provide San Jose with reliable and professional demolition services. Founded by seasoned contractors with years of experience in the Bay Area, we've built a reputation for tackling tough jobs with precision and care.

Our approach is straightforward: assess each project thoroughly, execute with skill, and leave the site clean and ready for the next phase. We value safety above all else, adhering to strict protocols and using advanced equipment to minimize risks and maximize efficiency.

We're proud to be a part of the San Jose community. From residential teardowns to commercial cleanouts, we're committed to delivering exceptional results that contribute to the growth and revitalization of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: Prioritizing safety on every job site, protecting our team and your property.

valueProps.title: Efficient Execution
valueProps.description: Completing projects on time and within budget, minimizing disruption to your schedule.

valueProps.title: Comprehensive Services
valueProps.description: Offering a full range of demolition and janitorial solutions to meet your specific needs.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our skilled team brings years of Bay Area experience to every project.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote from San Jose's leading demolition contractor.

services.name: Residential Demolition
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient demolition of houses, garages, and other residential structures.
services.description:
Residential demolition requires a delicate balance of power and precision. In San Jose, with its mix of older homes in Willow Glen and newer developments in Almaden Valley, understanding the specific construction and potential hazards is crucial. We handle everything from single-room demolitions to complete house teardowns, always prioritizing safety and minimizing disruption to your neighbors. Our team carefully assesses the site, identifies any potential environmental concerns like asbestos or lead paint, and develops a detailed plan to ensure a smooth and efficient demolition process.

We take care of all necessary permits and inspections, ensuring compliance with local regulations. Our equipment is specifically chosen for residential projects, allowing us to work in tight spaces and minimize noise pollution. We also prioritize responsible waste disposal, recycling materials whenever possible to reduce our environmental impact. Whether you're renovating, rebuilding, or clearing land for a new home, Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional residential demolition services.
benefits: Preparation of site for new construction

faq.question: Do I need a permit for residential demolition?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases a permit is required for residential demolition in San Jose. We handle the entire permit process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

faq.question: How long does residential demolition take?
faq.answer: The duration of the project depends on the size and complexity of the structure. A typical house demolition can take anywhere from a few days to a week.

faq.question: What happens to the debris after demolition?
faq.answer: We prioritize responsible waste disposal and recycling. We separate materials and transport them to licensed facilities for processing and disposal.

services.name: Commercial Demolition
services.shortDescription: Expert demolition services for commercial buildings, offices, and retail spaces.
services.description:
Commercial demolition projects in San Jose often present unique challenges, from navigating the dense urban landscape to working around existing infrastructure. We have the experience and equipment to handle a wide range of commercial demolition projects, including office buildings, retail spaces, and industrial facilities. Our team works closely with you to develop a customized demolition plan that meets your specific needs and minimizes disruption to your business operations.

We understand the importance of safety and efficiency in commercial demolition. We utilize advanced techniques and equipment to ensure a safe and controlled demolition process. We also prioritize responsible waste disposal, recycling materials whenever possible to reduce our environmental impact. From interior gutting to complete building teardowns, Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional commercial demolition services.
benefits: Safe and efficient demolition of commercial structures

faq.question: Do you handle asbestos abatement?
faq.answer: Yes, we are licensed and certified to handle asbestos abatement as part of our commercial demolition services. We follow strict protocols to ensure the safe removal and disposal of asbestos-containing materials.

faq.question: What types of commercial buildings do you demolish?
faq.answer: We demolish a wide range of commercial buildings, including office buildings, retail spaces, industrial facilities, and warehouses.

faq.question: How do you minimize disruption to surrounding businesses?
faq.answer: We carefully plan our demolition process to minimize noise, dust, and traffic congestion. We also communicate with surrounding businesses to keep them informed of our activities.

services.name: Interior Demolition
services.shortDescription: Selective interior demolition services for renovations, remodels, and tenant improvements.
services.description:
Interior demolition requires a high degree of precision and care. Whether you're renovating your home in Rose Garden or remodeling a commercial space in Santana Row, we can help you safely and efficiently remove walls, floors, ceilings, and other interior elements. Our team has the experience and equipment to handle a wide range of interior demolition projects, from small residential renovations to large-scale commercial remodels.

We understand the importance of minimizing dust and noise during interior demolition. We use dust control measures and noise-reducing equipment to protect your property and minimize disruption to your daily life. We also prioritize responsible waste disposal, recycling materials whenever possible to reduce our environmental impact. Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional interior demolition services.
benefits: Preparation of space for renovation or remodel

faq.question: Do you remove flooring?
faq.answer: Yes, we remove all types of flooring, including tile, hardwood, carpet, and vinyl.

faq.question: Can you remove walls without damaging surrounding structures?
faq.answer: Yes, our team is skilled at removing walls without damaging surrounding structures. We use specialized techniques and equipment to ensure a clean and precise demolition.

faq.question: How do you protect my furniture and belongings?
faq.answer: We cover and protect all furniture and belongings in the work area. We also use dust control measures to minimize dust and debris.

services.name: Concrete Removal
services.shortDescription: Professional concrete removal services for driveways, patios, foundations, and more.
services.description:
Dealing with cracked driveways or old patios can be a pain. We offer concrete removal services, offering a full range of services to remove concrete slabs, foundations, and other concrete structures. San Jose's climate, with its mild winters and dry summers, can put a strain on concrete over time, leading to cracks and deterioration. Our team has the expertise and equipment to handle all types of concrete removal projects, from small residential jobs to large-scale commercial projects.

We understand the importance of safety and efficiency in concrete removal. We use specialized equipment and techniques to break up and remove concrete quickly and safely. We also prioritize responsible waste disposal, recycling concrete whenever possible to reduce our environmental impact. Whether you're replacing a driveway, building a new patio, or removing an old foundation, Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional concrete removal services.
benefits: Preparation of site for new construction

faq.question: Do you recycle concrete?
faq.answer: Yes, we recycle concrete whenever possible. We transport concrete debris to licensed recycling facilities for processing.

faq.question: How much does concrete removal cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete removal depends on the size and thickness of the concrete, as well as the accessibility of the site. We provide free, no-obligation quotes.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for concrete removal?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required for concrete removal, especially if it involves removing a foundation or other structural element. We can help you determine whether a permit is required and handle the permit process for you.

services.name: Selective Demolition
services.shortDescription: Targeted demolition services designed to preserve specific parts of a structure.
services.description:
Sometimes, you only need to remove a portion of a building, not the entire thing. That's where selective demolition comes in. We can carefully remove specific parts of a structure while leaving the rest intact. This requires a high degree of skill and precision, as well as a thorough understanding of building construction. We handle a wide range of selective demolition projects, from removing walls and ceilings to demolishing entire sections of a building.

We understand the importance of minimizing damage to the surrounding structure during selective demolition. We use specialized equipment and techniques to ensure a clean and precise demolition process. We also prioritize safety, taking extra precautions to protect workers and the surrounding property. Whether you're renovating, remodeling, or simply need to remove a portion of a building, Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional selective demolition services.
process: Step 2: Careful Protection of Surrounding Areas
benefits: Preservation of specific parts of a structure
Preparation of space for renovation or remodel

faq.question: Can you remove a load-bearing wall?
faq.answer: Yes, we can remove load-bearing walls, but it requires careful planning and execution to ensure the structural integrity of the building. We will work with a structural engineer to develop a safe and effective demolition plan.

faq.question: How do you protect the surrounding areas during selective demolition?
faq.answer: We use a variety of methods to protect the surrounding areas, including dust barriers, plastic sheeting, and noise-reducing equipment.

faq.question: What types of selective demolition projects do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of selective demolition projects, including removing walls, ceilings, floors, and entire sections of buildings.

services.name: Janitorial Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive janitorial services for commercial properties in San Jose.
services.description:
Maintaining a clean and healthy work environment is crucial for productivity and employee well-being. We offer comprehensive janitorial services for commercial properties in San Jose, including office buildings, retail spaces, and industrial facilities. Our team provides a wide range of cleaning services, from daily cleaning to deep cleaning and specialized services.

We understand the importance of using eco-friendly cleaning products and practices. We use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions whenever possible to minimize our impact on the environment. We also prioritize safety, ensuring that our cleaning products and practices are safe for your employees and customers. Whether you need daily cleaning, weekly cleaning, or a one-time deep cleaning, Three Star Demolition delivers reliable and professional janitorial services.

faq.question: What types of cleaning services do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of cleaning services, including daily cleaning, weekly cleaning, deep cleaning, floor cleaning, window cleaning, and restroom cleaning.

faq.question: Do you use eco-friendly cleaning products?
faq.answer: Yes, we use eco-friendly cleaning products whenever possible. We are committed to minimizing our impact on the environment.

faq.question: How do you ensure the quality of your cleaning services?
faq.answer: We have a quality assurance program in place to ensure that our cleaning services meet your expectations. We conduct regular inspections and solicit feedback from our clients.

serviceAreas.content:
Three Star Demolition & Janitorial is proud to offer comprehensive demolition and janitorial services to the vibrant community of San Jose. We understand the unique needs of San Jose residents and businesses, from residential teardowns to commercial building demolitions and post-construction cleanup. Our commitment to safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility makes us the premier choice for demolition services in the heart of Silicon Valley. We are fully licensed and insured, providing peace of mind for every project we undertake.

Our experienced team is equipped to handle any demolition project, large or small. We prioritize minimizing disruption to the surrounding community and adhere to all local regulations and permitting requirements. Whether you're planning a home renovation or a large-scale commercial development, trust Three Star Demolition & Janitorial to deliver exceptional results.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Jose is the largest city in Northern California and the heart of Silicon Valley, known for its booming tech industry and diverse culture.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Three Star Demolition did an excellent job demolishing my old garage in Willow Glen. They were quick, efficient, and very professional. The team took great care to protect my property and cleaned up thoroughly afterwards. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Three Star Demolition to demolish an old retail space in downtown San Jose. The project was completed on time and within budget. There were a few minor communication issues, but overall, we were satisfied with their work.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Three Star Demolition did a fantastic job with our kitchen remodel. They carefully removed the old cabinets, flooring, and drywall without damaging the surrounding walls. The team was very professional and courteous, and they cleaned up thoroughly after each day of work.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I needed an old concrete patio removed from my backyard. Three Star Demolition gave me a fair price and completed the job quickly and efficiently. They hauled away all the debris and left the area clean and ready for landscaping. Great service!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: We've been using Three Star Demolition for our office cleaning for the past six months, and we've been very happy with their service. The office is always clean and tidy, and the staff is friendly and reliable. There have been a few minor issues, but they are always quick to address them.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Three Star Demolition helped us with a tricky selective demolition project, removing a section of wall to expand our living room. They were extremely careful and precise, minimizing dust and disruption. We're thrilled with the results!
